note: Cross-reference stamp (HK-12/PROD-26): first STAMP of a family tagged since scope-v1 — pre-existing tags v1..v6 are frozen history, the stamp starts asserting at v7 (contracts.md §3: no version exists that is not in a stamp, from the first stamp onward). artifacts is drift-checked: the vendored script must be byte-identical to the tag; consumers track their vendored tag via their .repin.toml [[tool]] manifest.
